figures.caption: Figure 3: Contribution of individual functional annotations relative to the full model with 74 annotations. Phenotypes are ordered by their polygenicity remaining after pruning with 𝑟g=0.3, favoring phenotypes with higher heritability. Annotations are sorted by their Euclidean distance. On the left, next to relative numbers of nucleotides (genome, exon, intron, intergenic), the Spearman rank correlation value between ACS and polygenicity across phenotypes is indicated. The symbols following each functional annotation on the right indicate the significance after Bonferroni correction for the Spearman correlation (significance: ***: p<0.001, **: p<0.01, *: p <0.05, n.s.: p≥0.05).
